commands.notes: Shared upload defaults and setting migration tests passed.

commands.notes: Generated release metadata and bundle for base-v0.8.11.
Previewed the consumer upgrade from base-v0.8.10 to base-v0.8.11.

Applied the locked foundation release and updated ops inheritance docs.
Inheritance contract, backend sync, frontend sync, and overlay compile all passed.
Workspace-head comparison also passed after the upgrade.

notes: The base change is narrowly scoped to shared upload allowlist defaults, setting migration, and matching documentation/seed data.
The release metadata uses a real base commit and the consumer release notes avoid placeholder content.
Ops consumed the new release through the existing foundation-release pipeline and all required inheritance/base-sync checks passed.
The only remaining uncommitted change in ops is the pre-existing smoke test edit that was intentionally restored after sync.

knownGaps: The ops worktree still contains the user-owned smoke test change in frontend/tests/smoke/system/system-pages.spec.ts.
No GitHub remote release publish was attempted in this session; the foundation release was cut locally and consumed locally.
No separate browser/UI verification was needed because this change only touched shared backend configuration and release plumbing.
